question_intent: Average charge amount for members with at least one payment over $10,000, who have charges in both 'Meals' and 'Lodging' categories, and are from the 'North American' or 'South American' region

plan.question_intent: Average charge amount for members with at least one payment over $10,000, who have charges in both 'Meals' and 'Lodging' categories, and are from the 'North American' or 'South American' region
plan.detail_query: SELECT m.member_no, m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc FROM member AS m JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (p.payment_amt > 10000) AND (r.region_name = 'North American' OR r.region_name = 'South American') AND (cat.category_desc = 'Meals' OR cat.category_desc = 'Lodging') GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, p.payment_no HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT cat.category_no) > 1)

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.member_no, m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
join_clauses: JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
blocks.notes: This block returns detailed information about members, their charges, payments, regions, and categories, filtered by payment amount, region, and category, grouped by member, charge, and payment, and having at least two distinct category numbers

blocks.notes: This block calculates the average charge amount from the detailed information provided by leaf_1

steps.sql:
SELECT m.member_no, m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (p.payment_amt > 10000)
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, p.payment_no
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT cat.category_no) > 1)

FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (p.payment_amt > 10000)
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, p.payment_no
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT cat.category_no) >= 1)

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average charge amount from the detailed information provided by leaf_1

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (p.payment_amt > 10000)
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, p.payment_no
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT cat.category_no) >= 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (p.payment_amt > 10000)
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, p.payment_no
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT cat.category_no) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'North American' OR r.region_name = 'South American') AND (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
HAVING (COUNT(p.payment_no) >= 0)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (r.region_name = 'North American' OR r.region_name = 'South American') AND (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt
HAVING (COUNT(p.payment_no) >= 0)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average charge amount for charges associated with members who have made at least one payment over 10,000?
